config.section.title: Community Center Bundles
config.bundle-variant.name: Bundle Pack
config.bundle-variant.tooltip: Choose which bundle pack to use. 'Default' leaves all bundles untouched — if another mod (like SVE) modifies bundles, those changes will still apply. Any other option replaces bundles with the chosen pack. Changes take effect at the start of the next in-game day.
config.completionist.name: Completionist Mode
config.completionist.tooltip: When enabled, every possible Community Center bundle is active — including all Remixed variants. Equivalent to CCCC. Recommended only on a new save, as it adds new bundle slots to existing rooms.
config.completionist.required-tooltip: This bundle pack requires Completionist Mode. It cannot be disabled while this pack is selected.
